name: Lord of the Click 5
short_description: Open a new chapter of epic battles! In "Lord of the Click 5" you will find a strategic deployment of troops, army upgrades and battles with powerful bosses. Evolve, use magic, and protect your kingdom from impending threats!
detailed_description:
"Lord of the Click 5" continues the legendary series of clickers, offering unique challenges, deep strategy and addictive gameplay. As the wise king, you once again join the battle to save the kingdom, which is plunging into darkness.

The game is a 2D autobatler with an isometric view. Arrange your troops, press "Play" and watch the majestic battles full of surprises. But now everything is in your hands — collect crystals and use powerful spells: summon tornadoes or strike enemies with lightning to turn the tide of battle!

Each new level brings more and more dangerous enemies and treacherous bosses. For your victories, you will receive stars that can be used to strengthen the army and unlock new combat abilities. Your strategy and instant decisions on the battlefield will be the key to victory.

Prepare for a world where the fate of kingdoms is determined by cliques. Take on the challenge, prove your skills and become a true legend in "Lord of the Click 5"!
